summary: When AI comment summaries are missing, report explicit reasons (timeout, disabled, model missing, response missing, or insufficient info in comments).
source_links: user-report: AI comments show 'Insufficient data' without reason
details: Propagate AI failures per issue with a __error__ marker so formatting can render timeout vs. missing info.
If no comments in period, show 'Insufficient data: no comments in period.'
If comments exist but summary empty, show 'Insufficient data: not enough information in comments.'
